pageContext.name: 2B YoRHa No. 2 Type B
pageContext.description: 2B (YoRHa No. 2 Type B) from NieR: Automata is now an Action Doll. With movable joints and the ability to stand on her own, be it on your desk or on a shelf!  She can easily recreate some of her most iconic poses with a wide range of movement and expressiveness provided by all the small details from the lace used on her sleeves to the embroidery on her skirt.
